boundary: This patch modifies Identity Vault JS path references and writes one static test file only after backup.
It does not modify Identity Vault database contents.
It does not read .env secret values.
It does not package node_modules, register Forge tools, write RMC memory, or activate agent identities.

findings.message: Some vault.db references remain in scanned JS files; review before connector registration.
Canonical DB opens read-only after path normalization.
A protected safety snapshot changed unexpectedly.
Static canonical DB Jest test did not pass in this environment; inspect stdout/stderr tail in JSON report.

db.js.text: // Init DB: Safe, local file-based (vault.db in project root, gitignore'd)

tests/db.canonical.test.js.text: // This test is static on purpose: it proves code defaults do not fall back to root vault.db.
test('db.js references data/identity_vault.db as the canonical local database', () => {
test('db.js does not directly default to root-level vault.db', () => {

db.js.text: // Init DB: Safe, local file-based (vault.db in project root, gitignore'd)
